description: Detects prototype pollution in JavaScript/TypeScript: for-in loops with subscript assignment without __proto__/constructor guard, Object.assign with JSON.parse. Simplified from Rust: flags for_in_statement nodes unconditionally (cannot check for subscript assignment inside body or guard keywords without #match? predicate support). All for-in loops flagged.

flag.message: for...in loop detected -- verify that subscript assignments inside guard against __proto__, constructor, and prototype keys
